## Weekly schedule

* [Pre-recorded videos](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uwKiT1o1TkI&list=PLyCNZ_xXGzpm7W9jLqbIyBAiSO5jDwJeE): approximately 1 hour per week [[Slides](https://github.com/robjhyndman/fpp3_slides)]
* Tutorials: 1 hour per week
* Online lecture: 10am Mondays
* Workshop: 1pm Tuesdays, [Lecture Theatre S3, 16 Rainforest Walk](https://maps.app.goo.gl/4AmDLWkY1yYZviFz8).
* [Recordings](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/lti/view.php?id=6049159)


|Week   |Topic                               |Chapter                          |Assignments |Quizzes |
|:------|:-----------------------------------|:--------------------------------|:-----------|:-------|
|26 Jul |[Introduction to forecasting and R](./week1/index.html)|[1. Getting started](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/intro.html)|            |        |
|02 Aug |[Time series graphics](./week2/index.html)|[2. Time series graphics](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/graphics.html)|            |        |
|09 Aug |[Time series decomposition](./week3/index.html)|[3. Time series decomposition](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/decomposition.html)|            |        |
|16 Aug |[Simple forecasting methods](./week4/index.html)|[5. The forecaster's toolbox](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/toolbox.html)|            |        |
|23 Aug |[Accuracy evaluation](./week5/index.html)|[5. The forecaster's toolbox](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/toolbox.html)|            |        |
|30 Aug |[Exponential smoothing](./week6/index.html)|[8. Exponential smoothing](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/expsmooth.html)|            |        |
|06 Sep |[Exponential smoothing](./week7/index.html)|[8. Exponential smoothing](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/expsmooth.html)|            |        |
|13 Sep |[ARIMA models](./week8/index.html)  |[9. ARIMA models](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/arima.html)|            |        |
|20 Sep |[ARIMA models](./week9/index.html)  |[9. ARIMA models](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/arima.html)|            |        |
|27 Sep |[ARIMA models](./week9/index.html)  |[9. ARIMA models](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/arima.html)|            |        |
|04 Oct |[ARIMA models](./week10/index.html) |[9. ARIMA models](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/arima.html)|            |        |
|11 Oct |[Multiple regression and forecasting](./week11/index.html)|[7. Time series regression models](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/regression.html)|            |        |
|18 Oct |[Dynamic regression](./week12/index.html)|[10. Dynamic regression models](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/dynamic.html)|            |        |

## Assessments

* [Forecasting competition](assignments/competition.qmd): 2%
* Weekly quizzes: 8%
* [Assignment 1](assignments/A1.qmd): 6%
* [Assignment 2](assignments/A2.qmd): 6%
* [Assignment 3](assignments/A3.qmd): 6%
* [Retail project](assignments/Project.qmd): 12%
* Final exam: 60%

## R package installation

Here is the code to install the R packages we will be using in this unit.

```r
install.packages(c("tidyverse","fpp3", "GGally"), dependencies = TRUE)
```
